pms.name: Doorby Property Management

geographicCoverage.citiesText: Chattanooga 79% · Hixson · Rossville (GA) · Ringgold (GA) · Ooltewah · 24 cities total observed in Chattanooga MSA data

pms.classificationRationale: Within the Chattanooga MSA data observed, Doorby's portfolio consists of 405 single-family addresses, 71 unit-level managed apartments in larger buildings, and 93 small-multifamily whole-property managed buildings averaging 2 units each. Zero buildings exceed the 50-unit institutional threshold. Total observed managed units in Chattanooga: 750. The operator may operate in other MSAs not represented in this dataset; classification reflects only the Chattanooga MSA observed activity. Within Chattanooga, the portfolio operates entirely as scattered-site management with no institutional-class assets, placing the operator on the Independent side of the operating axis at the MSA level.

pms.name: Brookside Properties

selectionBias.assessment: Above expected — comprehensive listing coverage indicated

geographicCoverage.citiesText: 100% Chattanooga (Meridian at Hamilton Place, The Emery) within observed MSA data

pms.classificationRationale: Within the Chattanooga MSA data observed, Brookside's portfolio consists of 4 institutional-class multifamily buildings (151–239 units each) across 2 communities, totaling 868 units. All four properties exceed the 50-unit institutional threshold, qualifying the operator for the Institutional operating axis on asset class. Listings cycle at 2.06× the expected MSA intensity for buildings of this size, consistent with whole-property leasing operations. There is no scattered-portfolio book in the observed Chattanooga data. The operator may operate in other MSAs not represented in this dataset; classification reflects only the Chattanooga MSA observed activity.
